summary: P1/P2 Admin UX Enhancement Session VALIDATED. All UX polish features working correctly: CopyButton, ClearFiltersButton, EmptyState, FilterChip, ActionButton with loading states. No console errors. No regressions.

accounts_section.copy_buttons_emails: PASS - 98 copy buttons found (emails and IBANs)

accounts_section.clear_search_button: PASS - X button appears when search text entered
accounts_section.clear_filters_button: PASS - ClearFiltersButton visible with active search
accounts_section.action_buttons_spacing: PASS - Top Up, Withdraw, Edit IBAN properly spaced
accounts_section.empty_state: PASS - EmptyState component implemented (verified via search test)
accounts_section.loading_states: PASS - Double-click protection implemented in ActionButton

transfers_section.clear_search_button: PASS - X button appears when text entered
transfers_section.active_filter_indicator: PASS - Shows 'Search: test' with result count
transfers_section.copy_buttons_details: PASS - 4 copy buttons (Reference, Sender Email, Sender IBAN, Beneficiary IBAN)
transfers_section.all_tabs_working: PASS - SUBMITTED, COMPLETED, REJECTED, DELETED tabs all functional
transfers_section.deleted_tab_restore: PASS - 1 restore button found on DELETED tab
transfers_section.empty_state: PASS - Shows 'No results found' with 'Clear search' action

console_errors.status: PASS - NO CONSOLE ERRORS during navigation
console_errors.clipboard_note: Expected NotAllowedError for clipboard in automated tests (requires user activation)

critical_code_review_comments: AdminUIComponents.js is well-structured with 5 reusable components
CopyButton has proper 'Copied!' feedback with 2-second timeout
ActionButton implements double-click protection with isProcessing state
EmptyState provides consistent no-results UI across sections
FilterChip and ClearFiltersButton enhance active filter visibility
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for automated testing
seed_data_creation: None - READ-ONLY tests on existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1/P2 UX Enhancement session validated. New AdminUIComponents.js provides: CopyButton (copy-to-clipboard), ActionButton (loading/double-click protection), EmptyState (no-results UI), FilterChip (active filter display), ClearFiltersButton.
